heading: Requirements for entry of certain cigarettes and smokeless tobacco products
label: 1681a Requirements for entry of certain cigarettes and smokeless tobacco products

Effective Date of 2006 AmendmentAmendment by applicable with respect to goods entered, or withdrawn from warehouse for consumption, on or after the 15th day after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 109–432section 401(g) of Pub. L. 109–432section 1681 of this titleDec. 20, 2006

children.text: the original manufacturer of those cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products has timely submitted, or has certified that it will timely submit, to the Secretary of Health and Human Services the lists of the ingredients added to the tobacco in the manufacture of such cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products as described in or , as the case may be;section 1335a of title 15section 4403 of title 15

children.label: A
children.text: the primary packaging of all those cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products; and

children.label: B
children.text: any other pack, box, carton, or container of any kind in which those cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products are to be offered for sale or otherwise distributed to consumers;

the manufacturer or importer of those cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products is in compliance with respect to those cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products being imported into the United States with a rotation plan approved by the Federal Trade Commission pursuant to section 1333(c) of title 15 or section 4402(d) of title 15, as the case may be;11See References in Text note below.1

if such cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products bear a United States trademark registered for such cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products, the owner of such United States trademark registration for cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products (or a person authorized to act on behalf of such owner) has consented to the importation of such cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products into the United States; and
the importer has submitted at the time of entry all of the certificates described in subsection (c).

children.heading: Personal-use cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products
children.label: 1 Personal-use cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products
children.text: Cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products that are imported into the United States in personal use quantities that are allowed entry free of tax and duty under subchapter IV of chapter 98 of the Harmonized Tariff Schedule of the United States. The preceding sentence shall not apply to any cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products sold in connection with a delivery sale.

children.heading: Cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products imported into the United States for analysis
children.label: 2 Cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products imported into the United States for analysis
children.text: Cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products that are imported into the United States solely for the purpose of analysis in quantities suitable for such purpose, but only if the importer submits at the time of entry a certificate signed, under penalties of perjury, by the consignee (or a person authorized by such consignee) providing such facts as may be required by the Secretary to establish that such consignee is a manufacturer of cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products, a Federal or State government agency, a university, or is otherwise engaged in bona fide research and stating that such cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products will be used solely for analysis and will not be sold in domestic commerce in the United States.

children.heading: Cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products intended for noncommercial use, reexport, or repackaging
children.label: 3 Cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products intended for noncommercial use, reexport, or repackaging
A
children.text: for which the owner of such United States trademark registration for cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products (or a person authorized to act on behalf of such owner) has consented to the importation of such cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products into the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: for which the importer submits a certificate signed by the manufacturer or export warehouse (or a person authorized by such manufacturer or export warehouse) to which such cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products are to be delivered (as provided in subparagraph (A)) stating, under penalties of perjury, with respect to those cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products, that it will not distribute those cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products into domestic commerce unless prior to such distribution all steps have been taken to comply with paragraphs (1), (2), and (3) of subsection (a), and, to the extent applicable, section 5754(a)(1)(B) and (C) of title 26.

children.heading: Customs certifications required for cigarette or smokeless tobacco product imports
children.label: c Customs certifications required for cigarette or smokeless tobacco product imports

children.text: a certificate signed by the manufacturer of such cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products or an authorized official of such manufacturer stating under penalties of perjury, with respect to those cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products, that such manufacturer has timely submitted, and will continue to submit timely, to the Secretary of Health and Human Services the ingredient reporting information required by or , as the case may be;section 1335a of title 15section 4403 of title 15

children.label: i
children.text: the primary packaging of all those cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products; and

children.label: ii
children.text: any other pack, box, carton, or container of any kind in which those cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products are to be offered for sale or otherwise distributed to consumers; and

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to those cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products being imported into the United States, such importer has complied, and will continue to comply, with a rotation plan approved by the Federal Trade Commission pursuant to section 1333(c) of title 15 or section 4402(d) of title 15, as the case may be; and11

children.label: A
children.text: if such cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products bear a United States trademark registered for cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products, a certificate signed by the owner of such United States trademark registration for cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products (or a person authorized to act on behalf of such owner) stating under penalties of perjury that such owner (or authorized person) consents to the importation of such cigarettes or smokeless tobacco products into the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: a certificate signed by the importer or an authorized official of such importer stating under penalties of perjury that the consent referred to in subparagraph (A) is accurate, remains in effect, and has not been withdrawn.

children.heading: State access to customs certifications
children.label: d State access to customs certifications

children.text: upon request to the agency of the United States responsible for collecting such certification; or
upon request to the importer, manufacturer, or authorized official of such importer or manufacturer.
